## Title: Replace deprecated CALLOC macro with standard calloc and add error handling

### Summary
The NFAPI VNF integration layer was using a deprecated `CALLOC` macro for dynamic memory allocation in PHY indication handlers. This macro had known safety issues and lacked proper error handling, risking undefined behavior when memory allocation failed. This patch replaces all `CALLOC` calls with the standard `calloc()` function and adds robust NULL-checking with graceful error handling. When allo
